# BuildrHQ — The Engineering Intelligence Suite

## What is BuildrHQ?

BuildrHQ is a developer-first platform that helps computer science students and software engineers master their craft, build standout portfolios, and land their first (or next) engineering role. It combines AI-powered tools, structured learning, and community features in one place.

## Core Features

### AI Resume Builder
Generate ATS-optimized, recruiter-ready resumes. Paste a job description and the AI tailors your resume bullets to match the role. Supports multiple templates, live preview, and one-click PDF download.

### AI Cover Letter Generator
Answer 5 targeted questions about yourself and the role. BuildrHQ writes a personalized, professional cover letter with your voice. Supports voice input (speak your answers) and PDF download.

### Mock Interview Platform
Practice technical interviews with AI. Get real-time feedback on your answers, tone, and structure. Covers system design, DSA, and behavioral rounds. Tracks your improvement over time.

### AI Practice (DSA + System Design)
Solve coding problems with AI hints that teach rather than spoonfeed. System design challenges with structured evaluation. Progress tracking across all problem categories.

### Project Builder Studio
Build real projects guided by AI. Get architecture suggestions, code reviews, and step-by-step completion paths. Every project generates verified proof-of-work for your portfolio.

### Open Source Tracker
Track your GitHub contributions, PRs, and open source activity in one dashboard. Discover beginner-friendly issues. Get AI analysis of your contribution patterns.

### Pathfinder Learning Paths
Structured AI-generated learning paths for CS topics (DSA, System Design, Web Dev, etc.). Each step has exercises, resources, and AI-verified checkpoints.

### KnowMe AI Profile
AI-powered developer profile that turns your resume, GitHub, and projects into a shareable intelligence page. Recruiters can ask the AI questions about you directly.

## Who Uses BuildrHQ?

- CS students (freshman → senior) preparing for internships and full-time roles
- Bootcamp graduates breaking into software engineering
- Self-taught developers building their first portfolio
- Developers switching roles or companies
- Anyone preparing for technical interviews at FAANG and top-tier companies

## Technical Stack

Built with Next.js 15 (App Router), Turborepo, Drizzle ORM, BetterAuth, deployed on Cloudflare Workers.

## Company

Built by Shunya Tech. Founded by Niraj Jha. Based in India.
